metadata.claim_boundary_note: Architecture-level DPTC Transformer simulator. Energy, latency, area, memory, optical-link, and control values are modeled or calibrated/proxy values. The artifact does not claim fabrication, physical-design, device-solver, bench-energy, or deployment evidence.
